Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A master of comic timing and transformation, this is Peter Sellers at his most brilliant and unpredictable.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Many Faces of Peter Sellers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director John Landis joins Trailers from Hell to talk 'Battle for the Planet of the Apes' and more.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Bonnie and Clyde' to 'Duck Soup,' filmmaker John Landis talks his favorite film trailers.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

Video.summary: From timeless romance to twisted love stories, Hollywood holds the key to our hearts.
Video.grandparentTitle: Falling In Love with Trailers from Hell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante highlights Hollywood's atomic age paranoia and the nightmares unleashed on unsuspecting audiences.
Video.grandparentTitle: Joe Dante Enters the Atomic Age
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brian Trenchard-Smith continues his deep dive into filmmaking, exploring the challenges and triumphs of bringing a vision to life on screen.
Video.title: Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2

Image.alt: Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2
Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2
Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2

Video.summary: A pantheon of prestige from more than 100 years of Hollywood, these are the classics we'll remember forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From spine-chilling thrills to edge-of-your-seat suspense, filmmaker Katt Shea talks her favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Ernest Dickerson talks epic filmmaking and the eternal struggles of cinema's greatest characters.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Five films. One legacy. Here's why Clint Eastwood's Harry Callahan is a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When it comes to comedy TFH creator Joe Dante has a soft spot for lovable oddballs, accidental heroes, and big-hearted dreamers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From slapstick classics to timeless musical comedies, celebrate Hollywood's golden age of laughter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Irreverent, iconic, and effortlessly cool, this is 1960s comedy at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From campy capers to daring satire, let's celebrate the offbeat style of 1960s comedy.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Outrageous, rebellious, and unforgettable, 1970s comedy went full throttle.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold, bizarre, and brilliantly original, these 80s films defined a generation of laughs.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Quirky, irreverent, and instantly iconic, you favorite filmmakers celebrate the best of ’90s comedy.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Joe Dante’s Classic Monster Madness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying.
Video.title: His Girl Friday

Video.summary: A bumbling photographer mistaken for a private detective becomes embroiled in a web of intrigue and danger as he tries to solve a murder case.
Video.title: My Favorite Brunette

Video.summary: Two unemployed show-biz pals accept treasure-diving work in Bali for a local princess and they find treasure, love and trouble.
Video.title: Road to Bali

Video.summary: What do you get when you cross “The Pink Panther,” with “Marx Brothers at the Circus?” A great time!
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1

Video.summary: Famed Australian director Brian Trenchard-Smith looks at the films that expanded genre cinema -- pioneering in style, scope, and world-building.
Video.title: Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 1
